data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for referral status tracking for customers, but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. While the use case describes a referral program, it lacks specific details on how the referral status is tracked for customers, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. The absence of concrete evidence regarding the tracking of referral statuses indicates a gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of tracking referral statuses for customers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
